ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class or group of the user */,
  "timeset" REAL /* Timestamp or timeset of the user's activity */,
  "indegree" INTEGER /* Number of incoming edges to the user */,
  "outdegree" INTEGER /* Number of outgoing edges from the user */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Total number of edges connected to the user */,
  "weighted_indegree" REAL /* Weighted sum of incoming edges */,
  "weighted_outdegree" REAL /* Weighted sum of outgoing edges */,
  "weighted_degree" REAL /* Weighted sum of all connected edges */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity of the user in the network */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the user */,
  "harmonic_closeness_centrality" REAL /* Harmonic closeness centrality of the user */,
  "betweenness_centrality" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the user */,
  "authority" REAL /* Authority score of the user */,
  "hub" REAL /* Hub score of the user */,
  "pagerank" REAL /* PageRank score of the user */,
  "component_number" INTEGER /* Component number the user belongs to */,
  "strong_comp_num" INTEGER /* Strong component number the user belongs to */,
  "modularity_class" INTEGER /* Modularity class of the user */,
  "stat_inf_class" INTEGER /* Statistical information class of the user */,
  "clustering" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the user */,
  "eigencentrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality of the user */,
  "behavior" INTEGER /* Behavioral pattern of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts the user has made */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the user's posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_modularity_class FOREIGN KEY ("modularity_class") REFERENCES modularity ("modularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_strong_comp_num FOREIGN KEY ("strong_comp_num") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_component_number FOREIGN KEY ("component_number") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES user_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_stat_inf_class FOREIGN KEY ("stat_inf_class") REFERENCES statistical_info ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the user class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user class was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Last date when the user class was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the network metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the network metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., centrality, clustering) */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the interaction */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_content" TEXT /* Content of the interaction */,
  "interaction_engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement level of the interaction */,
  "interaction_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior pattern */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user exhibiting the behavior pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior pattern */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the behavior pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior pattern */,
  "pattern_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the behavior pattern */,
  "pattern_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the behavior pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_patterns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "component_size" INTEGER /* Size of the component (number of users) */,
  "component_density" REAL /* Density of the component (number of edges divided by the number of possible edges) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modularity" (
  "modularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modularity class */,
  "modularity_class" INTEGER /* Modularity class number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modularity class */,
  "community_size" INTEGER /* Size of the community (number of users) */,
  "community_density" REAL /* Density of the community (number of edges divided by the number of possible edges) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modularity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_info" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical information class */,
  "stat_inf_class" INTEGER /* Statistical information class number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical information class */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical information */,
  "info_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistical information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pagerank_scores" (
  "pagerank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PageRank score entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for which the score is calculated */,
  "score" REAL /* PageRank score value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the PageRank algorithm used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the PageRank score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pagerank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pagerank_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering_coefficients" (
  "clustering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering coefficient entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for which the coefficient is calculated */,
  "coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the coefficient was calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the clustering coefficient */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the clustering coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clustering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_coefficients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eigencentrality_scores" (
  "eigencentrality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eigencentrality score entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for which the score is calculated */,
  "score" REAL /* Eigencentrality score value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the eigencentrality score */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the eigencentrality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eigencentrality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eigencentrality_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
